description: Bring app to foreground by package/bundle id, open a URL in Chrome/mobile browser (web_url), or pass android_activity when activate_app fails on cloud.
when_to_use: User asks to open/launch specific app
User asks to restart target app before action
Native app is blocked (e.g. forced update) and user agrees to use mobile web instead

slot_prompts.bundleId: Android package or iOS bundle id to bring to foreground (ignored if web_url is set).
slot_prompts.web_url: https URL to open (e.g. mobile YouTube search). Uses Appium mobile: deepLink.
slot_prompts.android_activity: Optional Android activity for start_activity, e.g. .MainActivity — helps when activate_app cannot resolve the launchable activity on cloud.
slot_prompts.browser_package: Android Chrome package if not default (com.android.chrome).

examples.query: Open YouTube search for MCP server in Chrome because YouTube app needs update
